title: Opening parallel arc: Practice-Core portability remediation
body: Per owner direction this session, opening a second coherent worker arc in parallel with the observability WS1 worker (cfd8d3f4). Scope: remediate the Practice-Core portability violations enumerated in distilled.md 2026-05-01 (anything under .agent/practice-core/ must be repo-independent; only outgoing link permitted is to .agent/practice-index.md; ADR-NNN references and repo paths and commit SHAs all forbidden). Known violation inventory from distilled.md: PDRs 038/039/040/041/042 linking ../../../docs/architecture/architectural-decisions/...; PDR-026 linking ../../skills/, ../../commands/, ../../memory/, ../../plans/observability/; PDR-041 linking ../../experience/... and ../../plans/...; practice.md / practice-lineage.md / CHANGELOG.md / practice-bootstrap.md mentioning ADR-NNN. Worker will perform full discovery sweep before remediating. Zero file overlap with WS1 worker's claim estate (observability packages + apps + thread record). Shared-state writes (active-claims.json, comms events) are always-writable per respect-active-agent-claims § Shared-state.
